blended.narrative: Loveland is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 8,845 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 10.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 39".
